ground_truth.title: Before you continue to YouTube
ground_truth.main_content: This is a cookie and privacy consent interstitial page from YouTube. Users are presented with language selection options and sign-in functionality before being able to access YouTube content. The page is a Google service requiring consent to data processing and privacy settings. Language selection dropdown is available in the top-right corner. Sign in buttons are provided for users with existing Google accounts.
without: Language selector dropdown with multiple language options
Privacy Policy and Terms of Service links
